text: We note the draft retains a North America / Europe focus. Should the geographic mandate be expanded to emerging markets, Norrland requires that its Fund II excusal rights (EU restrictive measures; sub-investment-grade jurisdictions, including rated jurisdictions in sub-Saharan Africa) carry over in full, together with the 15 Business Day advance notice mechanic.

EDFC supports a measured expansion of the geographic mandate to emerging markets. We request development-impact and E&S reporting parity with our Fund II side letter for any sub-Saharan Africa investment, and confirmation that the excluded-sectors restriction carries over.

The $75,000,000 MFN threshold in Section 13.9 should be reduced to $50,000,000, consistent with what we understand peer sponsors are granting in current vintages. At minimum the compendium should be delivered semi-annually rather than annually.

The management fee step-down should be triggered on the earlier of (i) expiration of the Investment Period and (ii) the date a successor fund begins accruing fees. Khalij also requests a fee holiday on the portion of its commitment above $250,000,000.
Hokuriku requests continuation of the quarterly unhedged non-USD currency exposure statement within 30 days of quarter end, as provided in our Fund I side letter.

Section 13.9 should clarify that the MFN compendium is delivered within 60 days of the final closing for the initial compendium, with elections exercisable on a provision-by-provision basis rather than as a package.
Cresswell expects 100% fee offset to be stated expressly to include placement-agent fees and any broken-deal expenses recovered from co-investors.

Ontario Metalworkers requests that co-investment opportunities be offered pro rata to commitments for all LPs above $100,000,000, with a 10 Business Day response window and no management fee or carry on co-invested capital.

Südwest requires a Solvency II data pack (look-through asset-class and rating detail) within 45 days of each quarter end. Please confirm whether the standard quarterly report can be extended or whether this should sit in our side letter.

The key person definition in Section 4.7 should name a third principal. Two of three key persons stepping back is too high a bar for suspension given the size of this vintage; we propose two of four with at least one founder.
